input_dict.question: Mindless Self Indulgence and Tappi Tíkarrass are both what?
input_dict.target_summary: Integrated evidence summary: Mindless Self Indulgence (MSI) is described as an American electropunk band formed in New York City in 1997. Tappi Tíkarrass is described as an Icelandic punk band which added elements of funk, rock and jazz to their music. The cited passages identify the two groups by those punk-related genres (MSI as an American electropunk band; Tappi Tíkarrass as an Icelandic punk band).
input_dict.candidate_summary: Punk bands. Mindless Self Indulgence is an American electropunk band. Tappi Tíkarrass was an Icelandic punk band.
